works.description:
Overview

A full renovation of a traditional townhouse reimagined with clean geometry, refined proportions, and improved spatial flow. Natural light plays a central role, with carefully positioned openings enhancing each room’s character.

Warm finishes, bespoke joinery, and thoughtful lighting bring elegance to everyday living, creating a cohesive home that feels modern yet firmly rooted in its historic neighbourhood.
